summary: Comprehensive testing of Krishi Voice Agent MVP completed. Backend APIs 94.7% success rate (18/19 tests passed). Frontend fully functional with complete onboarding flow, authentication, voice integration, and all core features working. Disease analysis, weather advisory, reminders, market connect, and profile management all operational.

ui_bugs.issue: Voice overlay can block clicks on other elements when open

passed_tests: Splash screen loads and Get Started button works
Language selection shows Hindi/Marathi/English and selection persists
Guest login works and redirects to profile setup
User registration works with proper validation
Profile setup page works with all form fields
Agent Home shows personalized greeting, quick actions, alerts, tips
Bottom navigation works for all 6 tabs (Agent, Disease, Weather, Reminders, Market, Profile)
Disease Analysis page loads with camera/upload options
Weather Advisory loads with real weather data from Open-Meteo API
Market Connect allows creating/viewing listings with nearby buyers
Profile page shows user info and language selection (English/Hindi/Marathi)
Voice overlay opens when clicking floating mic button
Authentication with JWT and httpOnly cookies works
AI chat integration with Gemini works
Disease analysis with image upload and AI analysis works
Fallback responses work when AI services fail
